resources.string: To work with media sessions, grant the app the required permission.
For proper operation, grant the app \"notification access\"
The system will assume music is playing from this app.
Replace the skip-to-previous button with a like button; the like state is also shown in the top marquee.
The action that will be performed when tapping the like icon in the widget and marquee

Broadcast intents to this app

In MacroDroid: Actions -> Send Intent
Target: Broadcast
Package: com.geely.online.service

Action: com.salat.gmproxy.DISABLE — stop forwarding the real media session to the binder; only MEDIA_UPDATE apply.

Action: com.salat.gmproxy.ENABLE — resume forwarding from the media session.

Action: com.salat.gmproxy.MEDIA_UPDATE
Extras: title, artist, album, cover (URL or path string), isPlaying (boolean), progressMs, durationMs (long, ms), forceMetadata (boolean, optional)


Broadcast intent from this app
When the like button action is set to Send intent, the app sends a broadcast you can receive in another app:
Action: com.salat.gmproxy.LIKE — register a BroadcastReceiver (or catch it in MacroDroid) and react when it is received.
